title: galium rubrum subsp. mucronatum
intro: Galium rubrum subsp. mucronatum, also known as Red Bedstraw, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the Rubiaceae family. Traditionally, Red Bedstraw has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds, skin irritations, and minor infections. The plant is also believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating menstrual cramps, and supporting digestive health. Red Bedstraw can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
